siteTitle: Dentagia - Modern, Secure, Cloud-Based Dental Software Powered by AI
siteDescription: Transform your dental practice with Dentagia's AI-powered practice management software. Streamline patient care, automate workflows, and grow your practice with secure, cloud-based solutions designed for modern dentistry.

sections.title: Modern, Secure, Cloud-Based Dental Software for Growing Your Practice
sections.description: Transform your dental practice with Dentagia's comprehensive practice management system. Powered by AI, our cloud-based platform streamlines patient management, automates appointments, simplifies billing, and helps you deliver exceptional care while growing your practice.

sections.subtitle: TRUSTED BY DENTAL PRACTICES
sections.title: Empowering Dental Practices with AI-Powered Technology
sections.description: Dentagia is revolutionizing dental practice management with cutting-edge AI technology and cloud-based infrastructure. Our platform helps dental practices of all sizes streamline operations, improve patient care, and grow their business. Built by dental professionals for dental professionals, we understand the unique challenges of running a modern practice.

sections.subtitle: GROW YOUR PRACTICE
sections.headline: Transform Your Dental Practice with AI-Powered Solutions
sections.description: Discover how Dentagia's modern, secure, cloud-based platform can streamline your operations, improve patient satisfaction, and drive practice growth.

cards.title: AI-Powered Scheduling
cards.description: Intelligent appointment scheduling that optimizes your calendar, reduces no-shows, and maximizes practice efficiency.

cards.title: Patient Management
cards.description: Comprehensive patient records, medical history, and treatment plans all in one secure, accessible platform.

cards.title: Automated Billing
cards.description: Streamline billing and invoicing with automated payment processing, insurance claims, and financial reporting.

cards.title: Practice Analytics
cards.description: Data-driven insights into your practice performance, patient trends, and growth opportunities.

benefits.title: Cloud-Based Accessibility
benefits.description: Access your practice data from anywhere, on any device. No more being tied to a single computer or location.

benefits.title: HIPAA-Compliant Security
benefits.description: Enterprise-grade security with encrypted data storage, regular backups, and compliance with healthcare regulations.

benefits.title: AI-Powered Automation
benefits.description: Intelligent automation handles routine tasks, freeing you to focus on patient care and practice growth.

benefits.title: Easy to Use
benefits.description: Intuitive interface designed for dental professionals. Get started quickly with minimal training required.

benefits.title: Comprehensive Support
benefits.description: 24/7 support from our team of dental practice management experts. We're here when you need us.

benefits.title: Scalable Solution
benefits.description: Grows with your practice. Whether you're a solo practitioner or a multi-location practice, Dentagia scales to meet your needs.

sections.subtitle: GET STARTED
sections.title: Simple Setup, Immediate Results
sections.description: Getting started with Dentagia is quick and easy. Our team guides you through every step to ensure a smooth transition.

steps.title: Schedule Demo
steps.description: See Dentagia in action with a personalized demo tailored to your practice needs.

steps.title: Quick Setup
steps.description: Our team helps you migrate your data and configure Dentagia for your practice in days, not weeks.

steps.title: Training & Onboarding
steps.description: Comprehensive training for your team to ensure everyone is comfortable with the platform.

steps.title: Go Live & Support
steps.description: Launch with confidence knowing our support team is available 24/7 to help whenever you need.

reviews.name: Dr. Sarah Martinez
reviews.content: Dentagia has transformed how we run our practice. The AI-powered scheduling alone saves us 10 hours per week, and our patient satisfaction scores have never been higher. The cloud-based system means we can access everything from anywhere.

reviews.name: Dr. Michael Chen
reviews.content: Switching to Dentagia was the best decision we made. The patient management system is intuitive, billing is automated, and the analytics help us understand our practice better. Our revenue has increased by 35% since implementation.

reviews.name: Emily Rodriguez
reviews.content: The support team is incredible, and the platform is so easy to use. We've reduced administrative time by 50% and our team loves how streamlined everything is. Dentagia truly understands what dental practices need.
